name: ClassificationApplyPreviewAndRun
description: Expiry-bound exact authorization plus purpose-scoped preflight evidence, durable per-item Ledger preconditions, terminal result, and resume frontier for assignment and correction.
schema_def: apply_preview(preview_id PK, operation_idempotency_id UNIQUE, evaluation_id FK, evaluation_fingerprint, selection_mode, selection_hash, ledger_contract_version, projection_version, store_generation_fingerprint, preflight_snapshot_id, preflight_expires_at, category_lifecycle_fingerprint, target_category_fingerprint, rule_authority_fingerprint, expires_at, selected_count, exclusion_count, no_suggestion_count, conflict_count, actor, created_at); apply_preview_item(preview_id FK, ordinal, outcome_id FK, transaction_id, mode=assign|correct, category_id, rule_version_id?, expected_current_category_id?, expected_active_allocation_id?, expected_transaction_revision, expected_relationship_revision, expected_allocation_revision, correction_reason?, PK(preview_id, ordinal)); apply_run(apply_id PK, preview_id FK, request_fingerprint, lifecycle_state, unresolved_frontier, actor, started_at, completed_at?); apply_item(apply_id FK, ordinal, transaction_id, ledger_operation_id, category_id, expected_active_allocation_id?, expected_transaction_revision, expected_relationship_revision, expected_allocation_revision, correction_reason?, ledger_request_fingerprint, ledger_idempotency_key, item_state, ledger_result_fingerprint?, ledger_allocation_id?, prior_ledger_allocation_id?, safe_error_code?, PK(apply_id, ordinal)). Apply begins only after repeated all-item apply_preflight matches the preview; frozen item fields form the exact replay request; terminal item rows never invoke Ledger again.
